results.title: Tuberville backs Trump’s data center push, calls for protecting ratepayers
results.description: Recent social media posts from President Donald Trump and U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Auburn) are highlighting Alabama’s opportunity to attract new data center investments while protecting existing utility customers from higher costs. President Donald Trump highlighted Alabama this week after New York Gov. Kathy Hochul imposed a temporary statewide moratorium on permits for new hyperscale [...] The post Tuberville backs Trump’s data center push, calls for protecting ratepayers appeared first on Yellowhammer News .

results.title: Terry Council grapples with DOT's ambiguous answer on Spring St. angled parking
results.description: This past winter, Terry Mayor Rolane Christofferson was notified of concerns that angled parking on Spring Street was interfering with the free movement of Montana Department of Transportation snowplows. In response, town officials and a group of residents formed a...

results.title: House Republicans' $95 billion Iran war package clears first hurdle
results.description: Republicans on the House Budget Committee have advanced a $95 billion package for the Iran war, farm aid and President Donald Trump’s push for strict new voter ID requirements.

results.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over betting claims
results.description: US President Donald Trump has suspended a teleprompter operator over allegations he placed bets with a prediction market on the content of Mr Trump's speeches, the White House said.

results.title: Trump administration caps how long international students can stay in the US
results.description: The rule, which goes into effect in September, also puts in place restrictions on when and how students may change their major or academic program.
